raw_items.title: The Global Risks Report 2026 | World Economic Forum
raw_items.summary: The report analyses global risks through three timeframes to support decision-makers in balancing current crises and longer-term priorities. Chapter 1 presents the findings of this year’s Global Risks Perception Survey (GRPS), which captures insights from over 1,300 experts worldwide.

raw_items.title: What the Global Risks Report 2026 Is Really Telling Cities...
raw_items.summary: I did not approach the Global Risks Report 2026 in search of new or unexpected findings.The report shows risks compounding across domains: climate change, debt, inequality, infrastructure failure, misinformation, and geopolitical tensions.

raw_items.title: What are the major global threats facing society and the economy...
raw_items.summary: According to the World Economic Forum´s Global Risk Report 2026, geoeconomic confrontation, mis- and disinformation and societal polarization make up the top three short-term risks, while environmental risks dominate in the long term.
